dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5839 IH: Supplemental Benefits for Individuals Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Balderson introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend title XXVII of the Public Health Service Act to include certain supplemental coverage provided to individual health insurance coverage as an excepted benefit.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Supplemental Benefits for Individuals Act of 2025.

section.header: Including certain supplemental coverage provided to individual health insurance coverage as an excepted benefit
section.text: Section 2791(c)(4) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 300gg–91(c)(4)) is amended by inserting or individual health insurance coverage before the period at the end.
